description: Test quality check L03 for plateau6 (CityGML 3.0). A veg:PlantCover is placed under the bldg package; bldg accepts only Building / CityObjectGroup, so L03 reports one invalid feature type (L03エラー=1, L03エラー詳細={"PlantCover": Number(Number(1))}). The injected member has no codeSpace attribute so the codeSpace check stays clean (不正なcodeSpace数=0). PACKAGE_TO_VALID_FEATURE_TYPES is local-name based, so the same map applies to CityGML 3.0 (Building/PlantCover keep their 2.0 local-names). The loosely-structured PlantCover is also XSD-invalid, so it raises one L02 error as a side effect (L02エラー=1 in summary_common.json); the XML検証結果 / L02エラー columns are therefore excluded from the 01_共通.csv comparison (mirrors plateau4 L03). The objectlist xlsx under fixtures/plateau6-citymodel/ is a stand-in (copied from plateau4) until the i-UR 4.0 取得項目一覧 is finalized.
